title: AN ACT CREATING AN ADDITIONAL BRANCH OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE TWELFTH JUDICIAL REGION TO BE STATIONED AT THE MUNICIPALITY OF MIDSAYAP, PROVINCE OF NORTH COTABATO, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS âTHE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980â³, AS AMENDED, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
S. No. 3017; H. No. 6845; 109 OG No. 34, 5783 (August 26, 2013); Manila Bulletin; Philippine Star, May 27, 2013

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10542, May 15, 2013 ]

AN ACT CREATING AN ADDITIONAL BRANCH OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE TWELFTH JUDICIAL REGION TO BE STATIONED AT THE MUNICIPALITY OF MIDSAYAP, PROVINCE OF NORTH COTABATO, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS âTHE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980â³, AS AMENDED, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. One (1) additional Regional Trial Court branch for

Midsayap, North Cotabato, with seat thereat, is hereby created in the

Twelfth Judicial Region.

SEC. 2. The Supreme Court shall assign the branch number for the newly created branch.

SEC. 2. The Supreme Court shall assign the branch number for the newly created branch.

SEC. 3. The Chief Justice of the Supreme Court, in coordination

with the Secretary of the Department of Justice, shall immediately

include in the Courtâs program the implementation of this Act. The

funding therefor shall likewise be included in the annual General

Appropriations Act. The funds necessary for the operation of the Court

herein created shall be appropriated and released only upon the actual

organization of the Court and the appointment of its personnel.

SEC. 4. Section 14(m) of Batas Pambansa Blg. 129, otherwise known

as âThe Judiciary Reorganization Act of 1980â³, as amended, as well as

other provisions that may be inconsistent herewith, are hereby deemed

repealed, modified and/or further amended.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in two (2) newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

This Act which is a consolidation of Senate Bill No. 3017 and House

Bill No. 6845 was finally passed by the Senate and the House of

Representatives on October 15, 2012 and February 6, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

(Sgd.)

EDWIN B. BELLEN

Acting Senate Secretary

Approved: MAY 15 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
